name: message_drafts
title: Message Drafts
description: An unsent message the owner is composing -- a faithful port of a private predecessor-system audit's separate MessageDraft model, not part of this repo. The source kept drafts as their own model rather than a status value on Message, and this package follows that same split rather than adding a draft status to schemas/messages.json. thread_id is optional: a reply-in-progress sets it (see objects/site/message_thread.py's Save Draft action); a brand-new compose leaves it blank. Saving a draft here never sends anything -- no SMTP transport exists in this package (see dbbasic-package.json's deferred list); a draft is data only, same as every other collection in this package.

fields.name: thread_id
fields.label: Thread
fields.help: Blank for a new compose not yet attached to any thread.

fields.name: to_addresses
fields.label: To
fields.help: Comma-separated address snapshot, same convention as messages.json carries for addressing.
